compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: Core convergence issue RESOLVED by the ToolStrategy root-cause fix (see c7c5): the verifier now converges on code-heavy tickets (WS-3: timeout at 500 steps -> 78s PASS) via output_strategy='extract'; sonnet is the decisive default (opus over-explores). The original 'practical budget' AC is met. Remaining here as OPTIONAL future optimizations surfaced by the prior-art research: per-criterion fan-out (LangGraph Send + deterministic reducer), per-criterion context PRE-SELECTION (Aider repo-map / FastContext line-ranges) so the agent doesn't hunt, and small bounded per-unit budgets. Left open for those enhancements.

compiled_state.description:
The LLM completion verifier is budget-impractical for code-heavy, multi-criteria tickets.

## Context
Discovered dogfooding the close gate on this feature's own epic + workstreams. On a faster, decisive model (sonnet) a FOCUSED ticket (≈2 small AC) converges in ~12s, but a code-heavy workstream whose AC reference large files (e.g. WS-3: ~4 AC across `_cli/__init__.py` ~1000 lines, `mcp_server.py`, test files) does NOT converge even at recursion_limit=500 / ~560s. The agent reads many large files / searches across criteria; there is no cheap shortcut to verifying implementation-completeness of a code-heavy ticket. With the gate enabled, such tickets currently can't be closed without a very high REBAR_LLM_MAX_STEPS or `--force-close`.

## Candidate directions
- A lightweight repo-map / orientation (tree-sitter/PageRank à la Aider) so the agent reads less.
- Stronger budget steering (hard tool-call cap) and/or summarized-file reads.
- The framework-wide AutoStrategy/ProviderStrategy migration (separate follow-up) for cheaper structured output.
- Per-ticket file-impact hints (`set_file_impact`) to focus the agent on the relevant files.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] A code-heavy multi-criteria workstream ticket verifies (PASS/FAIL) within a practical budget/latency on the default verifier model.
- [ ] Decision recorded: raise the gate's default budget, add a repo-map, or scope the gate to focused tickets.
compiled_state.title: Completion verifier: efficiency for code-heavy tickets (budget limit)
